author: codex
scope: Codex-only preparation for duplicate_global_identity backlog after identity221, focused on MTA parent/headquarters/agency identity-key contamination where parent MTA records share keys with committees, subsidiaries, officers, departments, sibling agencies, or service programs. No overrides, canonical/generated outputs, DB, manifest, wiki, or LOG files were mutated.

messages: Global entity records entity_audit-committee-charter and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_audit-committee-charter.
Global entity records entity_audit-committee-charter and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_mta-audit-committee.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: AUDIT COMMITTEE
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The Audit Committee is a board committee of MTA, not the parent Metropolitan Transportation Authority itself. The shared Audit Committee keys on the parent record are committee-contamination aliases.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep MTA Board committee records separate from parent MTA even when names include 'MTA'. Use explicit relation/parent fields for committee-to-MTA membership or oversight context.

messages: Global entity records entity_capital-program-committee-charter and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_capital-program-committee.
Global entity records entity_capital-program-committee-charter and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_mta-capital-program-committee.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Capital Program Committee Meeting
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Capital Program Committee is a committee record. Parent MTA is a transit authority record. Shared committee keys on the parent record are not evidence of same identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge committee charters/work plans into parent MTA or into MTA Construction & Development; represent oversight relationships separately.

messages: Global entity records entity_finance-committee-mta and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_finance-committee.
Global entity records entity_finance-committee-mta and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_mta-finance-committee.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: N. Zuckerman, Chair
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The Finance Committee is a committee of the MTA Board. It is not identical to the parent MTA transit authority.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Suppress parent/committee shared keys such as 'finance committee' on the broad MTA parent cluster.

messages: Global entity records entity_mta-construction-and-development and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_construction-and-development.
Global entity records entity_mta-construction-and-development and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_mta-construction-and-development.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: MTA Construction & Development (MTA C&D) was officially established in December 2019...
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Construction & Development is a distinct MTA subsidiary/affiliate identity, not the parent MTA authority.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge subsidiary/agency records into the parent authority. Use hierarchy relations for MTA C&D as part of or affiliated with MTA.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_headquarters.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_mta-headquarters.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: payload entity_name 'MTA Headquarters'; identity keys include entity_headquarters and entity_mta-headquarters
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Headquarters is an HQ/administrative unit cluster. It should not collapse into the parent MTA authority solely because HQ appears as an MTA unit.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep HQ administrative-unit identities separate from parent MTA. This does not preclude targeted alias merges among exact MTAHQ/HQ records.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_janno-lieber-2025 and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_j-lieber.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: MTA Chair & CEO Janno Lieber...
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Janno Lieber is a person/officer; MTA is an organization. The shared Lieber key on the parent cluster is officer-name contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep people, titles, and signatories separate from organizations. Attach roles with works_for/chair/ceo-style relations rather than identity merges.

messages: Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-lirr and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_long-island-rail-rd.
Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-lirr and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_long-island-rail-rd-lirr.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Long Island Rail Road--2021 Performance
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Long Island Rail Road is an MTA subsidiary/railroad entity, not the parent MTA authority.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge railroad subsidiaries into the parent MTA. Use organization hierarchy relations for parent/subsidiary links.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-131651-mta-risk-insurance and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_meeting-doc-131651-mta-risk-insurance.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-131651-mta-risk-insurance and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_mta-risk-and-insurance-management.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: MTA Risk & Insurance Mgmt.
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Risk and Insurance Management is a division/function within MTA, not the parent authority itself.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep internal divisions and departments separate from parent MTA; represent department-of relations explicitly.

messages: Global entity records entity_mta-entity-update-2025 and entity_mta-real-estate share identity key entity_meeting-doc-mta-real-estate.
Global entity records entity_mta-entity-update-2025 and entity_mta-real-estate share identity key entity_mta-real-estate.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities...
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Real Estate is an agency department/function, not the parent MTA authority. The shared MTA Real Estate aliases on the parent are department contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: This DNM is only parent-vs-department. Target selection inside the MTA Real Estate / RED / TOD family still needs its own cleanup.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-64066-mta and entity_sarah-meyer-cco-mta share identity key entity_sarah-meyer.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-64066-mta and entity_sarah-meyer-cco-mta share identity key entity_sarah-meyer-chief-customer-officer-mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Metropolitan Transportation Authority

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: Sarah Meyer, MTA Chief Customer Officer
source_canonical_evidence.quote: Sarah Meyer Chief Customer Officer, MTA

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Sarah Meyer is a person/officer. The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is an organization. Shared Sarah Meyer keys on the MTA record are signer/officer contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge signers or officers into agency records. Preserve person-to-agency roles separately.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-bus-company share identity key entity_mta.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-bus-company share identity key entity_mta-bus-company.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
Two divisions within the MTA are responsible for managing these routes...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT and MTA Bus Company are related MTA bus-operating entities but are not the same agency identity. Shared parent-MTA or bus-company aliases are sibling/subsidiary contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not collapse NYCT, MTA Bus Company, MaBSTOA, or SIRTOA solely because combined committee/work-plan sources list them together.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_department-of-buses and entity_nyct-mta-bus-committee-charter share identity key entity_mta-nyct.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Bus Camera Security System Contract...

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: Committee on Operations of NYCT, MaBSTOA, SIRTOA and MTA Bus Company
source_canonical_evidence.quote: COMMITTEE ON OPERATIONS OF THE NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY, THE MANHATTAN AND BRONX SURFACE TRANSIT OPERATING AUTHORITY, THE STATEN ISLAND RAPID TRANSIT OPERATING AUTHORITY AND THE MTA BUS COMPANY

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Department of Buses is an NYCT department; the Committee on Operations is a board committee overseeing NYCT/MaBSTOA/SIRTOA/MTA Bus. They are distinct despite the shared NYCT/MTA key.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep departments separate from committees. Combined committee names should not become identity aliases for operating departments.

skipped_review_only.reason: Both appear to be broad parent-MTA clusters, but entity_mta-entity-update-2025 is heavily contaminated with committee, officer, subsidiary, HQ, and department aliases. Exact target choice should be handled after parent-cluster alias hygiene.

Access-a-Ride is plainly not parent MTA, but current AAR cluster also carries parent MTA aliases and many service-program variants. It deserves a dedicated AAR/service-program cleanup rather than a one-off decision here.

Likely broad MTA parent aliases, but they collide with NYCT and AAR through generic entity_mta keys. Skipped to avoid duplicating prior broad-MTA cleanup and to avoid choosing a canonical parent target in this prep artifact.
This is likely a distinct-related-agencies guardrail, but it was already noted as reviewer-only in identity221 and is outside this parent-contamination slice.

skipped_review_only.candidate: entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr / Metro-North committee and parent-MTA collisions
skipped_review_only.reason: Metro-North agency, committee, and parent aliases are tangled across several records. Existing batch220 covered one NYCT-vs-MNR DNM; the remaining cluster needs a dedicated Metro-North cleanup pass.

commands_not_run: No materialize, validate, export, or canonical/generated-output mutation commands.
commands_run: jq inspections of data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch220-prep.json, codex-identity-batch221-entity-prep.json, codex-identity-batch221-nonentity-prep.json, and codex-identity-batch218-prep.json
jq read-only inspections of data/canonical/entities.jsonl for selected MTA parent, HQ, agency, committee, department, and person records
sed read-only inspections of selected wiki/entities/*.md frontmatter for MTA parent/HQ/agency records
rg -n read-only search across data/review_notes identity prep artifacts for selected MTA-related record ids
jq read-only inspections of data/identity-review/records.jsonl for selected record identity fields, evidence samples, aliases, and keys
jq read-only extraction of selected duplicate_global_identity messages from data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl
jq read-only check of data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json for the proposed pairs
